description: Configuration for network diagram visualization in StructureRelations webapp

node_shapes.description: Node shapes mapped to DICOM structure types for network diagram visualization. Valid shapes: star, hexagon, diamond, box, ellipse, triangle, triangleDown, dot, square

relationship_styles.description: Line styles for relationship edges in network diagram

diagram_options.description: Default options for network diagram visualization

diagram_layout.description: Grouped layout and physics settings for interactive diagram positioning

layout_rules.description: Constraint-based stress layout (cola.js) parameters for the relationship diagram. Computed headlessly client-side; vis-network renders with physics off.

convergence.description: cola iteration budget: stress-only, then user constraints, then all constraints.

flow.description: Vertical separation for hierarchical/directional relations. Opt-in for the cola engine (cola_strict): hard layering collapses tree-like graphs into a column, so it is off by default and the 2D stress spread is used instead.

side_bias.description: L nodes to the right, R nodes to the left, B between; each L/R/B set kept level for symmetry.

opt_grouping.description: opt/eval variants clustered in a tight cola group. Families larger than max_group_size (hub-centred bases with many partitions) are left unboxed so the stress solver spreads them instead of collapsing them into a central tangle.

target_grouping.description: Target volumes sharing a dose level (e.g. PTV70 / PTV70a / PTV70b) clustered as a cola group with looser padding. Families larger than max_group_size are left unboxed to spread.

tooltips.description: Controls which fields are shown in diagram tooltips. Set a field to false to hide it.

edges.description: Controls which relationship details appear in edge tooltips. Set 'relationship' to 'label' for the human-readable name, 'symbol' for the relationship symbol/notation, or 'type' for the internal relationship ID.

metrics.description: Controls display of quantitative metrics for spatial relationships. Metrics must be calculated first using calculate_relationships(calculate_metrics=True). Only applicable metrics for each relationship type will be shown.

display_mode_options.auto: Show most relevant metrics based on relationship type (1-3 metrics)
display_mode_options.compact: Show only the single most critical metric (e.g., minimum margin)
display_mode_options.summary: Show all aggregated 3D metrics (no per-slice data)
display_mode_options.detailed: Show aggregated metrics plus key per-region breakdowns
display_mode_options.full: Show all available metrics including per-slice and per-region data

margins.description: Clearance distances inside containing structure. Applicable to CONTAINS, SURROUNDS, SHELTERS relationships.

orthogonal_directions.description: Which orthogonal margin directions to display. Options: 'all', 'worst', 'transverse', 'longitudinal', or list of specific directions.

distance.description: Gap between disjoint structures. Applicable to DISJOINT and SHELTERS relationships. N/A for BORDERS, CONFINES, EQUAL.

volume.description: Volume overlap metrics. Applicable to OVERLAPS, PARTITION, CONTAINS, EQUAL relationships.

ratio_basis_options.auto: Use relationship-appropriate denominator (larger for PARTITION, average for OVERLAPS)
ratio_basis_options.average: Ratio relative to average of both structures

surface.description: Surface boundary overlap metrics. Applicable to BORDERS and CONFINES relationships.

geometry.description: Geometric properties of structures and their relationships.

per_region_display.description: Controls display of per-region metric breakdowns for multi-region structures.

per_slice_display.description: Controls display of per-slice metric data. Typically shown in detailed investigation view, not edge tooltips.
